div.p: You have items item in your cart

button.class: btn btn-secondary d-none d-md-inline-block fa fa-minus
button.name: sale_quantity_button_minus

button.class: btn btn-secondary d-none d-md-inline-block fa fa-plus
button.name: sale_quantity_button_plus

td.title: Delivery will be updated after choosing a new delivery method

td.class: text-end pe-0 pt-0 pb-2 border-0 text-muted
text-end pe-0 pt-0 pb-2 border-0 text-muted
border-0 pb-2 ps-0 pt-0 text-start text-muted

t.div: Congratulations! You qualify for free shipping!
You're away from earning free shipping on your order!
